name: Leg of Lamb
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a few cuts in the roast so spices can be inserted into the cuts. Deep cuts can also be made to facilitate serving.
2. Rub the leg with the spices, including garlic, Rosmary, vinegar, lemon juice, paprika, black pepper, and chili powder.
3. Place the leg in a baking pan.
4. Roast in a preheated oven at 210°C (410°F) for 10 minutes, then turn the meat over.
5. Lower the heat to 150°C (300°F) and continue baking for about 25 minutes per kilogram of meat.
6. Every 10 minutes, baste with the liquids and add some of the soup and lemon juice mixture.
7. Turn the roast a few times during cooking.
